items.title: Claude by Anthropic - Release Notes - April 2026 - Releasebot
items.author: releasebot.io
items.snippet: Anthropic has released several significant API updates in early 2026. The most notable is the launch of Claude Managed Agents in public beta — a fully managed agent harness for running Claude autonomously with secure sandboxing, built-in tools, and server-sent event streaming (requires the `managed-agents-2026-04-01` beta header). Claude Sonnet 4.6 has also launched as the latest balanced model with improved agentic search performance, extended thinking support, and a 1M token context window in

items.author: blog.mean.ceo
items.snippet: Anthropic has been active on Twitter (@AnthropicAI) in April 2026 with several major announcements. Key highlights include the launch of Claude Managed Agents in public beta — a fully managed agent harness for running Claude autonomously with secure sandboxing, built-in tools, and server-sent event streaming. items.title: Donating the Model Context Protocol and establishing the Agentic AI Foundation
items.author: www.anthropic.com
items.snippet: Anthropic's most significant recent announcement is Claude Mythos Preview (April 7, 2026), a new general-purpose frontier model described as strikingly capable at computer security tasks — surpassing nearly all humans at finding and exploiting software vulnerabilities. Alongside it, Anthropic launched Project Glasswing, committing up to $100M in usage credits to use Mythos Preview to help secure critical open-source software, plus $4M in direct donations to open-source security organizations. No

items.title: Claude by Anthropic - Release Notes - April 2026 Latest Updates - Releasebot
items.author: releasebot.io
items.snippet: Anthropic has had an explosive start to 2026, launching major model upgrades and over 120 new features in Q1 alone. On February 5, 2026, Anthropic released Claude Opus 4.6 and Sonnet 4.6, both featuring a 1,000,000-token context window (Sonnet in beta). Opus 4.6 tops professional benchmarks in legal, financial, and coding tasks, holds the #1 spot on the Finance Agent benchmark, and supports a 14.5-hour task completion horizon — the longest of any AI model as of early 2026. Sonnet 4.6 now handles

items.title: Anthropic Economic Index: Economic Primitives (January 2026)
items.author: www.anthropic.com
items.snippet: Anthropic has published several notable research papers and reports in early 2026. On the economic research front, they released the 'Anthropic Economic Index: Learning Curves' (March 2026) studying Claude usage patterns, a 'Labor Market Impacts of AI' paper introducing a new measurement framework for AI's effect on labor markets, and the 'Economic Primitives' report (January 2026) establishing new AI usage metrics. An education-focused study, the 'AI Fluency Index,' analyzed 9,830 conversations
